{"title":"","content":[[{"tag":"at","user_id":"@_user_1","user_name":"毛俊涵","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":" Rocky，这周几个事情哈：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"上周同步的4个内容资源机会，其中CNN不需要寄样，我在跟进是否需要单独和publisher签合约等，因为这个位置有固费：$3500","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"lifewire的地址我正在问，若也类似CNN，不用寄样的话我在群里同步","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"其他两个表黄色的已经给到地址了，还请直接寄样并给到tracking No.","style":[]},{"tag":"img","image_key":"img_v3_02109_08e5e599-0d83-4d9c-b232-dc650d21bb3g","width":2516,"height":1066},{"tag":"text","text":"今日新增两个博主寄样申请，还请评估可以合作后我们沟通地址：","style":[]},{"tag":"a","href":"https://lcnodf7uc7ln.feishu.cn/sheets/FokFswXx5hVxB6t8piqcFtChn1e?sheet=tkX6VH","text":"https://lcnodf7uc7ln.feishu.cn/sheets/FokFswXx5hVxB6t8piqcFtChn1e?sheet=tkX6VH","style":[]},{"tag":"img","image_key":"img_v3_02109_8b52fc1c-5d77-4c18-bb70-d803ceb17a2g","width":2790,"height":302}]]}

text: 另外，ACC部分我们后续都会在次月的下半月，拉取详细数据给到大家确认。25年11月-26年2月的ACC数据已经在周报表格中补充了，若金额确认无误后我们来跟进invoice补充。后续每月的ACC会及早确认并和其他金额共同开invoice出来。

{"title":"","content":[[{"tag":"text","text":"Hi Ottocast Team,","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Hope you're doing well! I wanted to reach out regarding your current commission structure on Wayward as we transition to our new Creator Connections bonus commission model.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"As you know, following the recent Amazon reporting changes, we're moving to a model where brands can offer bonus commissions on Wayward that are distributed across our publisher network. This gives you more control over how you incentivize top publishers.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"In order to activate these bonus commissions, your Wayward Associates rate needs to be higher than your Creator Connections rates for active products.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"From reviewing your account, I noticed that 8 of your active Creator Connections ASINs currently have the same or higher rates on Creator Connections compared to Wayward. Because of that, these products aren't eligible for bonus commissions right now, which limits publisher coverage.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"I've attached a CSV with a breakdown of each ASIN, including:","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Current Wayward (Associates) commission","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Creator Connections rate","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Recommended commission increase to make those ASINs eligible for bonuses","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"In general, we recommend setting Wayward commissions ~5% higher than Creator Connections to start seeing consistent pickup.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Feel free to review and let me know your preferred commission structure. Once confirmed, I'm happy to get these rates updated on Wayward for you.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Let me know if you have any questions!","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Best,","style":[]}]]}

text: @_user_1 Rocky，目前我们直联的pub 佣金25%的都是attribution，会有10%返佣给ottocast，所以实际支付只有15%。这两个publisher如果继续降低佣金的话，我们就没办法维持和他们的合作了，因为15%本身就不高了。且目前咱们畅销的产品AOV都较低，佣金继续下调的话对于pub来讲吸引力很小。

text:
Hello Team,

Hope you’re doing well.

This is Aryan from PYJ Media.

I’m reaching out to explore a structured, performance-driven collaboration where growth is guided entirely by real data rather than assumptions.

How Our Approach Stands Apart

We don’t function as a conventional affiliate partner.
Instead, we design and manage controlled acquisition funnels powered by paid traffic ecosystems, continuously optimized using live conversion signals.

Our framework operates across two key layers:

Layer 1 — New User Acquisition
We source and acquire traffic through vetted publisher networks and performance-driven platforms.

Layer 2 — Intent-Based Monetization
Users demonstrating engagement are re-engaged via:
• Push notification journeys
• Dynamic display and native formats
• Email reactivation flows
• Behavioral retargeting systems

Key Point:
All campaigns run exclusively on audiences we acquire ourselves, ensuring no overlap with your existing campaigns or internal retargeting efforts.

Traffic Ecosystem

We currently operate across multiple traffic environments, including:
PropellerAds | Evadav | HilltopAds | Adsterra | Reklamstore | Galaksion

This diversified setup allows us to test rapidly, optimize efficiently, and scale only the segments that prove profitable.

Next Steps

We recommend starting with a controlled pilot phase to assess performance alignment.

The technical integration is lightweight and can be seamlessly implemented via Google Tag Manager, requiring minimal effort from your team.

I’ve also shared our Corporate and Remarketing decks for a more detailed overview of our capabilities and execution model.

If this aligns with your current growth priorities, I’d be happy to connect for a quick discussion or outline the next steps.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
Aryan
Team PYJ Media

这个转给你们看看有没有需要哦@_user_1 @_user_2 
email: [business@pyjmediaprivatelimited.com](mailto:business@pyjmediaprivatelimited.com)

text:
@_user_1 @_user_2 我解释下我为什么目前只是选择了mrge 

TOPCASHBACK 主根据我们英国的小伙伴了解，要还是收益市场还是英国，北美其次， 目前相关amz.uk的推广内容以及预算没有到达可以做返现的标准

Canndr 是个不错的review site 但是基于亚马逊需要强效果投产比， 我们担心大预算做测评不能带来明显的转化

ZiffDavis 是一个很不错的平台， 但是由于我们CA520的备货数量， 站内流量足以支持日常的销售，没有必要特定为单一产品的销量放大
